nodes.label: Lamech (father of Noah)
nodes.description: The seventh in descent from Seth, being the only son of Methuselah. Noah was the oldest of his several sons (Gen. 5:25-31; Luke 3:36).

nodes.label: Methuselah
nodes.description: Man of the dart, the son of Enoch, and grandfather of Noah. He was the oldest man of whom we have any record, dying at the age of nine hundred and sixty-nine years, in the year of the Flood (Gen. 5:21-27; 1 Chr. 1:3).

verses.text: And Methuselah lived an hundred eighty and seven years, and begat Lamech:
